calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Scott for and with (petitioner/sole beneficiary) Kathryn Strong.

The Court stated that Ms. Marsh is not present and confirmed that Ms. Scott did not expect her to appear. Ms. Scott stated that the issue of appointment of administrator is resolved. The Court stated that the withdrawal of the petition did not withdraw the objections but that no one is here to argue. Ms. Scott asked if the issue that the examiner had with the will has been resolved. The Court stated that it is overruling the objections. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with will annexed (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
